{{ (vendor.primary_admin.display_name or vendor.primary_admin.email) if vendor.primary_admin else "—" }}

{{ (vendor.secondary_admin.display_name or vendor.secondary_admin.email) if vendor.secondary_admin else "—" }}
Roster last confirmed
{{ vendor.roster_last_confirmed_at or "Never" }}

{% if vendor.billing_amount_minor is not none %}{{ vendor.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(vendor.billing_amount_minor / 100) }} / {{ vendor.billing_frequency }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
Annualized cost
{% if vendor.annualized_cost_minor is not none %}{{ vendor.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(vendor.annualized_cost_minor / 100) }}{% else %}Unknown ("other" frequency){% endif %}
Seats
{{ vendor.seat_count if vendor.seat_count is not none else "—" }}
Contract
{% if vendor.contract_url %}Open{% else %}—{% endif %}

{{ vendor.renewal_date or "—" }}
Auto-renew
{{ vendor.auto_renew }}
Cancellation deadline
{{ vendor.cancellation_deadline or "—" }}
Renewal owner
{{ (vendor.renewal_owner.display_name or vendor.renewal_owner.email) if vendor.renewal_owner else "—" }}
Support portal

{{ vendor.support_email or "—" }}
